response: Renaissance art flourished under her careful study and analysis. She compiled a masterful catalogue that defined the era for future scholars. Her work on the Renaissance period revealed hidden connections between artists. Another comprehensive catalogue emerged from her years of research in Florence. The spirit of the Renaissance inspired her lifelong dedication to uncovering truth. A third essential catalogue documented the evolution of painting styles. She remained a central figure throughout the Renaissance revival of classical ideals. Her legacy in art history is unmatched.
